name: The Ragdoll
short_description: The Ragdoll is a fast-paced stickman-fighting game where you can challenge your friends and strangers, but you can also play co-operative tournaments with them if you feel like it.
detailed_description:
What is The Ragdoll?


The Ragdoll is a fast-paced, action filled fighting game, which looks back to our childhood-favorite stickman fight games but with modern twists.
In this game you'll have the chance to have fun either alone or with your friends and even with strangers.

Features


• Three different, themed tournaments
• Dozens of unlockable skins
• Dozens of different objects to fight with
• 15+ unlockable maps
• Local quick game and co-op tournaments
• Online co-op tournaments and two PvP game modes,
• Full controller support
• 15+ achievements
• Puns
